signatureMove.name: Crowd Control
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals {Null} damage against models which are further than 1" away.
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy is within 1" it is moved 1" directly away from this model.

abilities.name: Asleep on the Job
abilities.description: This model may not be chosen to be the player's first activation unless it is the only model which can activate. When this character activates it gets +1 Melee Stat and reduces its Evade Stat by -3 until end of turn.

abilities.name: Halberd
abilities.description: If this character deals Piercing or Impact Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Ramshackle Armour
abilities.description: Reduce all non-Magical Dmg suffered by -1.

abilities.name: Secret Stash
abilities.description: This character cannot lose possession of a Moonstone due to an enemy model unless slain.

abilities.name: Goblin City Guard
abilities.description: If a Goblin in possession of a Moonstone within 4" and LoS suffers Dmg, you may use this character to suffer that Dmg instead. Once per turn.

abilities.name: Stand to Attention!
abilities.description: Target other friendly Goblin gains 1 energy. If the target is a Soldier it may also move 2".
